title: Scout Reforked
description: A mod that displays the backpack directly in the player's inventory by equipping a satchel.
body:
_I have not used any of [Scout](https://modrinth.com/mod/scout)'s code; this mod is only published under the same name._

Optional dependency  
[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) - [TheIllusiveC4](https://modrinth.com/user/TheIllusiveC4)

This mod lets you naturally extend your inventory by equipping satchels. Instead of opening a separate interface with a key like B, you can manage your backpack's contents directly from the player inventory screen (E).

The bags in this mod can also be equipped separately in the armor slots and accessory slots.

Future updates:

- Configurable number of bag slots
- More new bags and styles
- Compatibility with JEI and other popular mods

![Player's Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6a1f562260f29b625b57be375454854c02990e3.png)

This mod is customized for the modpack [TerraFirmaCraft Remake](https://github.com/RainLasea/TerraFirmaCraft_Remake)

### Credits:
- makamys - Original inspiration from Satchels
- Cynosphere - Original modder - [Scout](https://modrinth.com/mod/scout)
- TheIllusiveC4 - [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
